Plastic Pollution and its Economic Drivers
Jonathan Flores Martinez, Avery Stewart, Justin Mai
Research Question 1

Which plastic types are the most abundant in the audits, and does this change from country to country?

Research Question 2

How are demographic, economic, and geographic characteristics of countries associated with differences in plastic collected during cleanup audits?
